question: Can a single continuous fully-funded SOLUSDT equal-quantity spot-long/perpetual-short carry pass post-cost, post-capital-hurdle and path-risk gates across sequential 2023, 2024 and 2025-2026 periods?
relationship_to_prior_work: Same broad carry mechanism as the supported mature-alt basket, but SOL data and a single-pair operating form have not been opened; no dynamic universe or threshold is reused.
position: equal SOL quantity long Binance spot and short Binance USD-M perpetual continuously
capital: spot purchase plus equal futures guarantee margin; no leverage credit
phase_gate: data PASS; stress total and post-4%-hurdle returns >0; every year slice positive; max drawdown >-5%; funding > absolute basis; 8h block-bootstrap 95% lower mean >0
holdout_release_rule: development fetch only after checkpoint; evaluation only after development pass; confirmation only after evaluation pass
